title: 16S V3-V4 Subsampled Test Dataset
author: Polakovicova, Petra
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This dataset provides a small, subsampled collection of 16S rRNA gene amplicon sequencing data targeting the V3–V4 region, intended for rapid testing and validation of bioinformatics pipelines. 
 The dataset is derived from publicly available sequencing runs deposited in the    Sequence Read Archive   (SRA) , including accession numbers: 
 
 SRR13005968 
 SRR13005969 
 SRR13005986 
 SRR13005987 
 
 The original data were generated using paired-end sequencing (2 × 300 bp), suitable for full overlap of the V3–V4 region. To facilitate fast and efficient pipeline testing, the datasets were subsequently  subsampled , reducing file size and computational requirements while preserving representative sequence characteristics.
